name: Last Standing (Annihilation)
author: AstroWebEngine example
description: Implements the 'annihilation' win condition that the core engine leaves to a mod: the last team still holding any base wins — your guild if you're in one, else you alone (so 'last guild standing' when guilds are in play, 'last player standing' otherwise). Pairs with the conquest engine flags (occupation_capture) that let players actually lose bases. Registers the compute_victory override hook. Runs code, so it only loads when the operator enables behavioral mods (AWE_ALLOW_BEHAVIORAL_MODS=true) and enables this mod.
